topic.title: Full Release Notes
topic.shortdesc: This release includes new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements.

ul.li: Introduced dark mode across all screens.
New CSV export for all report types.
Fixed session timeout not resetting on activity.
Resolved incorrect totals in the billing summary.

section.title: Known Issues
section.p: The following issues are known and will be addressed in the next release:

ul.li: Export to PDF may fail for reports exceeding 1000 rows.
